title: Hard Times
description: A realism focused modpack designed to test your survival skills! How well do you fare without a hotbar? <3
body:
### **Hard Times are... well, hard.**


This modpack is designed to be fairly difficult by adding realism elements ontop of the game.

## **Focus on _Realism (ooh)_**
-----------------------
Various features to add difficulty were added, such as being unable to heal and requiring bandages to heal, a thirst mechanic, and a temperature mechanic were added to have a focus on realism. In addition, various other things to make the game look more realistic were added, such as some resource pack & multiple shader options.

## **No HUD? No Problem.** <3
-----------------------
You don't have a HUD in real life anyway, why should your Minecraft self have one? This modpack does away with the HUD, requiring you to look in your hand to see what you're holding. In addition, you won't be able to tell if you're hungry, hurt, or thirsty by just looking at a bar! Now you have to wait until you start experiencing symptoms, like being unable to sprint, to be able to tell if you need to eat, drink, heal, cool off, warm up, or even breathe.

## **Increased Overall Difficulty**
-----------------------
Oh, Minecraft is too easy now, was it? Let's see how well you manage to live in this environment! <3

This modpack adds many things to make the world just that much more unfriendly to play with, such as:

- Various passive mobs are now neutral.
- Rare chance to spawn mutant mobs.
- There is now hardcore darkness; make sure to bring those torches!
- Various things that couldn't hurt you before now can! (Torches, stonecutters, etc.)
- Difficulty is locked on hard mode. (assuming you don't cheat or whatever...)
- Rarely, there will be blood moons that make the night horrifically dangerous.
- Mob AI is smarter overall.
- Torches burn out over time and get extinguished by water. Bring a flint & steel!
- Villagers are unhappy with you pillaging from their chests, increasing trade costs and potentially causing iron golems to attack!
- Added extra steps for getting wood & stone, and trees are harder to chop down.

## **World Overhauling**
-----------------------
With multiple terrain, cave, and dimension overhauling mods and several structure mods, the Minecraft overworld, nether, and end hardly even look the same as before, granting so much more exploration opportunities just waiting to be discovered!


# **Happy Minecrafting!** <3
